series_metadata.series_description: Reports prepared on the examination of licensees and certified testing labs pursuant to Chapter 3772 of the Ohio Revised Code, the rules adopted thereunder, and other chapters or sections of the Ohio Revised Code. The reports usually contain statements regarding the work performed, findings, and conclusions regarding compliance with the Ohio Revised Code, and other applicable laws, regulations or rules.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Paper: Unless converted into electronic format that has been verified as an accurate copy, maintain paper format three years or no longer of administrative value, whichever is longer ; Electronic: three years or no longer of administrative value agency, whichever is longer
